intro.title: Hi Kitty...
intro.subtitle: Before today begins, I want to take you through our journey.

story.title: The Beginning
story.text: Somewhere in December 2017, two lives quietly crossed paths. Neither of us knew that this meeting would become the beginning of a lifetime of memories.

story.title: Forever Begins
story.text: On this day we got engaged. It wasn't just a ring—it was the promise of a future together.

story.title: Our Wedding
story.text: The day we became husband and wife. The day our forever truly started.
